subject: Custom training staffs quote
snippet: Hey Angela, I got a quote from Sierra Hardwoods for the custom ash training staffs...
body:
Hi Angela,

I got a quote from Sierra Hardwoods for the custom ash training staffs for the belt ceremony. They can make 12 staffs for $20 each, total $240. I put the quote file in the data folder. Let me know if we can approve and pay this quote.

Thanks,
Tomas

subject: Cabin booking and details
snippet: Hey Ang, booked the cabin for our training ride weekend in Gold Country...
body:
Hey Ang,

Booked the cabin for our training ride weekend in Gold Country. Total is $180 for your share. Can you send me your bank routing and checking account details so I can set up direct transfer? Let me know.

Marcus

subject: Bruno Lima injury and roster notes
snippet: Hey Angela, during yesterday's kids class, Bruno Lima landed awkwardly...
body:
Hey Angela,

During yesterday's kids class, Bruno Lima landed awkwardly and sprained his ankle. I think it is a grade 2 sprain. Since you are a PT, can you write up a clinical recovery plan and treatment exercises I can send to his parents? Also, we should add his asthma and chronic ankle instability history to the Airtable roster for tracking.

Let me know,
Tomas

subject: Belt ceremony travel plans
snippet: Oi Angela, I have confirmed my travel for the ceremony. I will arrive in Sacramento...
body:
Oi Angela,

I have confirmed my travel for the ceremony. I will arrive in Sacramento on Friday, November 13 at 4 PM and leave Sunday, November 15 at 6 PM. I look forward to evaluating you for the Master Instructor rank. Please make sure the guest room is ready and send me the ceremony schedule once finalized.

Abracos,
Mestre Pintado

subject: Weekend dinner and schedule
snippet: Hi love, just checking if you have conflicts on Friday night, November 13...
body:
Hi love,

Just checking if you have conflicts on Friday night, November 13. I know Mestre Pintado is arriving then, so I was thinking we could all have dinner together at Riverside Kitchen. Let me know if that works with your clinic schedule and kids classes.

Beijo,
Sofia
